item.title: 【Spark on AmpereOne® M Arm Processors Reference Architecture】AmpereOne® M Arm 处理器参考架构上的 Spark
item.description:
【

Introduction

Arm technology now powers a broad spectrum of on-premises and cloud server workloads. Building on Ampere Computing's previous reference architecture, which demonstrated that Apache Spark on Ampere Altra – 128C (Ampere Altra 128 Cores) processors delivers superior performance per rack, lower power consumption, and optimized CapEx and OpEx, this paper evaluates and extends that analysis to showcase Spark performance on the latest generation of AmpereOne® M processors.

Scope and Audience

This document describes the process of setting up, tuning, and evaluating Spark performance using a testbed powered by AmpereOne® M processors. It includes a comparative analysis of the performance benefits of the 12-channel AmpereOne® M processors relative to their predecessors, specifically Ampere Altra – 128C processors. Additionally, the paper examines the Spark performance improvements achieved by using a 64KB page-size kernel over standard 4KB page-size kernels.

】

简介

Arm 技术现在为广泛的本地和云服务器工作负载提供支持。 Ampere Computer 之前的参考架构表明，Ampere Altra – 128C（Ampere Altra 128 核）处理器上的 Apache Spark 可提供卓越的每机架性能、更低的功耗以及优化的资本支出和运营支出，本文评估并扩展了该分析，以展示最新一代 AmpereOne® M 处理器上的 Spark 性能。

范围和受众

本文档介绍了使用 AmpereOne® M 处理器支持的测试台设置、调整和评估 Spark 性能的过程。它包括对 12 通道 AmpereOne® M 处理器相对于其前代处理器（特别是 Ampere Altra – 128C 处理器）的性能优势的比较分析。此外，本文还研究了使用 64KB 页面大小内核相对于标准 4KB 页面大小内核所实现的 Spark 性能改进。

item.title: 【Engineering for the Answer Engine: GEO for RAG-Friendly Web Apps (TalentHacked.com Case Study)】答案引擎工程：面向 RAG 友好的 Web 应用程序的 GEO（TalentHacked.com 案例研究）
item.description:
【

LLMs are becoming a discovery layer. Users ask a question, the model synthesizes an answer, and then it may cite a few sources. That shifts the goal from “rank and win a click” to “be the most useful, extractable, verifiable source in the retrieval set.”

For TalentHacked.com (UK Global Talent Visa platform), this is a solvable engineering problem: ship content that a headless retriever can fetch, chunk, embed, and cite.

】

LLM 正在成为一个发现层。用户提出问题，模型综合答案，然后可能会引用一些来源。这将目标从“排名并赢得点击”转变为“成为检索集中最有用、可提取、可验证的来源。”

对于 TalentHacked.com（英国全球人才签证平台）来说，这是一个可解决的工程问题：传送无头检索器可以获取、分块、嵌入和引用的内容。

item.title: 【How to Evaluate and Maximize Cloud Migration ROI?】如何评估并最大化云迁移投资回报率？
item.description:
【

Cloud migration is no longer a forward-looking initiative, but a growth necessity for modern enterprises. As the “early adopter” era comes to an end, with more than 50% of workloads running in the public cloud, organizations are discovering that migrating to the cloud and profiting from it are two very different challenges. 

Realizing true cloud cost savings requires moving away from a lift-and-shift mindset and toward a TCO (total cost of ownership)-driven ROI calculation strategy. Leaders must look beyond the monthly bill and understand how to calculate the ROI of cloud migration using a compounding lens and across agility, scalability, and mobility. This guide explores the frameworks, hidden costs, and strategic shifts necessary to transform your migration into a high-yield investment.

】

云迁移不再是一项前瞻性举措，而是现代企业的增长必然。随着“早期采用者”时代的结束，超过 50% 的工作负载在公共云中运行，组织发现迁移到云并从中获利是两个截然不同的挑战。 

要实现真正的云成本节省，需要摆脱直接迁移的思维方式，转向 TCO（总拥有成本）驱动的 ROI 计算策略。领导者必须超越每月的账单，了解如何使用复合视角以及敏捷性、可扩展性和移动性来计算云迁移的投资回报率。本指南探讨了将迁移转变为高收益投资所需的框架、隐性成本和战略转变。

item.title: 【Reduce Frontend Complexity in ASP.NET Razor Pages Using HTMX】使用 HTMX 降低 ASP.NET Razor 页面中的前端复杂性
item.description:
【

Modern web development often defaults to heavy client-side frameworks (React/Angular) for CRUD applications, introducing significant architectural overhead and “dependency hell.” By integrating HTMX with ASP.NET Razor Pages, we shifted DOM rendering back to the server, utilizing HTML fragments instead of JSON APIs. This approach eliminated complex client-side state management, reduced custom JavaScript by approximately 85%, and maintained a seamless, single-page application (SPA) feel with minimal infrastructure costs.

The “Failure” of the Modern SPA Forest

Engineers often find themselves trapped in a “forest” of NPM packages, Webpack configurations, and Vite build scripts just to render a simple list or validate a form field. In our initial architectural attempts, using a heavy SPA framework for a standard CRUD application manifested in:

】

现代 Web 开发通常默认为 CRUD 应用程序使用重型客户端框架（React/Angular），从而引入显着的架构开销和“依赖地狱”。通过将 HTMX 与 ASP.NET Razor Pages 集成，我们将 DOM 渲染转移回服务器，利用 HTML 片段而不是 JSON API。这种方法消除了复杂的客户端状态管理，将自定义 JavaScript 减少了大约 85%，并以最低的基础设施成本保持了无缝的单页应用程序 (SPA) 感觉。

现代SPA森林的“失败”

工程师经常发现自己陷入 NPM 包、Webpack 配置和 Vite 构建脚本的“森林”中，只是为了渲染简单的列表或验证表单字段。在我们最初的架构尝试中，对标准 CRUD 应用程序使用重型 SPA 框架，具体表现在：

item.title: 【The Embed Is the Product: Rethinking AI Distribution】嵌入就是产品：重新思考 AI 分发
item.description:
【

The AI industry has picked up a familiar playbook from the developer tools era: ship an API, write documentation, let developers build. This confuses access with distribution. An API grants you access to a capability but doesn’t help you with distribution.

After years of building embedded analytics at ThoughtSpot, I’ve come to the conclusion that for AI products with user-facing surfaces, an API alone won’t cut it. If you want developers to actually adopt your product, not just play with it, you also need to ship embeddable UI alongside your endpoints.

】

人工智能行业拿起了开发者工具时代熟悉的剧本：发布 API、编写文档，让开发人员构建。 这混淆了访问和分发。 API 授予您访问能力，但没有帮助您进行分发。

经过一年在 ThoughtSpot 构建嵌入式分析之后，我得出的结论是，对于具有面向用户的界面的 AI 产品，仅需要 API不会削减它。如果您希望开发人员真正采用您的产品，而不仅仅是玩它，您还需要随端点一起提供可嵌入的 UI。

item.title: 【Engineering Agentic Workflows: Architecting Autonomous Multi-Agent Systems With MCP and LangGraph】工程代理工作流程：使用 MCP 和 LangGraph 构建自治多代理系统
item.description:
【

The Shift From RAG to Agentic AI

For the past two years, the industry has been obsessed with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). While RAG solved the "hallucination" problem by providing models with external data, it remained a fundamentally linear and passive architecture: a user asks a question, the system fetches data, and the model generates an answer.

As we move through 2026, we are witnessing a paradigm shift from these linear pipelines to Agentic Workflows. Unlike a standard LLM call, an "Agent" is a system that can reason about a goal, decompose it into sub-tasks, use tools to interact with the world, and self-correct when it encounters errors. However, building these systems at an enterprise scale introduces massive architectural challenges in state management, tool interoperability, and security.

】

从 RAG 到代理 AI 的转变

过去两年，业界一直痴迷于检索增强生成 (RAG)。虽然 RAG 通过向模型提供外部数据解决了“幻觉”问题，但它本质上仍然是一种线性和被动的架构：用户提出问题，系统获取数据，模型生成答案。

随着 2026 年的到来，我们正在见证从这些线性管道到代理工作流程的范式转变。与标准的LLM调用不同，“代理”是一个系统，可以推理目标，将其分解为子任务，使用工具与世界交互，并在遇到错误时进行自我纠正。然而，在企业规模上构建这些系统在状态管理、工具互操作性和安全性方面带来了巨大的架构挑战。

item.title: 【Smart Controls for Infrastructure as Code with LLMs】法学硕士的基础设施即代码智能控制
item.description:
【

Infrastructure as Code (IaC) has transformed how we manage and provision infrastructure in the cloud. It enabled developers to consider compute, storage, network, and other infrastructure components as software which was not the case before infra was modeled as code. This approach has addressed multiple challenges including consistency and repeatability. IaC provides guarantees that identical environments will be created every time for a given IaC template, improving reliability and minimizing drift in configuration. Whereas manual provisioning was prone to errors, which can lead to inconsistencies between environments. IaC also integrates with version control systems such as Git, enabling teams to review changes, track changes, rollback to prior states, and collaborate on infrastructure definitions using code — similar to application development. IaC can also help reduce the costs through automated provisioning and de-provisioning of resources, optimizing the utilization and reducing idle resource costs.

Risks and Challenges

IaC introduced significant risks such as increased blast radius despite the benefits stated above. A single error or misconfiguration could propagate across multiple environments, potentially affecting entire production systems because IaC facilitates deployments at scale. This could result in widespread outages or security vulnerabilities. As an example, a single line of code can accidentally allow public access to an S3 bucket that could expose sensitive organizational data if overlooked while writing or reviewing code.

】

基础设施即代码 (IaC) 改变了我们在云中管理和配置基础设施的方式。它使开发人员能够将计算、存储、网络和其他基础设施组件视为软件，而在基础设施被建模为代码之前情况并非如此。这种方法解决了包括一致性和可重复性在内的多项挑战。 IaC 保证每次都会为给定的 IaC 模板创建相同的环境，从而提高可靠性并最大限度地减少配置偏差。而手动配置很容易出错，这可能会导致环境之间的不一致。 IaC 还与 Git 等版本控制系统集成，使团队能够审查更改、跟踪更改、回滚到之前的状态，并使用代码协作处理基础设施定义 - 类似于应用程序开发。 IaC 还可以通过自动配置和取消配置资源、优化利用率并降低闲置资源成本来帮助降低成本。

风险与挑战

尽管 IaC 具有上述优点，但它还是带来了重大风险，例如爆炸半径增加。单个错误或错误配置可能会在多个环境中传播，从而可能影响整个生产系统，因为 IaC 有助于大规模部署。这可能会导致大范围的中断或安全漏洞。例如，单行代码可能会意外地允许公众访问 S3 存储桶，如果在编写或审查代码时被忽略，则可能会暴露敏感的组织数据。

item.title: 【Integrating OpenID Connect (OIDC) Authentication in Angular and React】在 Angular 和 React 中集成 OpenID Connect (OIDC) 身份验证
item.description:
【

OpenID Connect (OIDC) is an identity layer on top of OAuth 2.0. If you’ve used “Sign in with Google/Microsoft/Okta/Auth0”, you’ve already used OIDC. In modern single-page apps (SPAs), the best practice is:

  • Authorization Code Flow + PKCE
  • Store tokens in memory (avoid localStorage when possible)
  • Use the provider’s well-known discovery document
  • Protect routes and attach access tokens to API calls

This guide shows an end-to-end setup for both Angular and React.

】

OpenID Connect (OIDC) 是 OAuth 2.0 之上的身份层。如果您使用过“使用 Google/Microsoft/Okta/Auth0 登录”，则您已经使用过 OIDC。在现代单页应用程序 (SPA) 中，最佳实践是：

  • 授权代码流程 + PKCE
  • 将令牌存储在内存中（尽可能避免使用localStorage）
  • 使用提供商的众所周知的发现文档
  • 保护路由并将访问令牌附加到 API 调用

本指南展示了 Angular 和 React 的端到端设置。

item.title: 【The 2026 Guide to Ecommerce Security and Development】2026年电子商务安全与发展指南
item.description:
【

In 2026, ecommerce security is no longer just a technical concern, it defines the strategic business growth, customer trust, and long term brand flexibility. As a leading custom application and web development company, Nevina Infotech has partnered globally to build  secure, scalable, and yielding ecommerce platforms.

Cyber-attacks have increased frequently in the past few years with more sophisticated ways of attacks. According to the Verizon Data Breach Investigation Report, the top causes for data breaches across industries including ecommerce are misconfigured systems, phishing and credential abuse. 

】

到 2026 年，电子商务安全不再只是一个技术问题，它定义了战略业务增长、客户信任和长期品牌灵活性。作为领先的定制应用程序和 Web 开发公司，Nevina Infotech 已在全球范围内开展合作，打造安全、可扩展且高效的电子商务平台。

过去几年，网络攻击频繁增加，攻击方式也更加复杂。根据 Verizon 数据泄露调查报告，包括电子商务在内的各行业数据泄露的主要原因是系统配置错误、网络钓鱼和凭据滥用。

item.title: 【Clock Synchronization and Ordering Events in Distributed Systems: Lamport Clocks vs. Vector Clocks】分布式系统中的时钟同步和排序事件：Lamport 时钟与矢量时钟
item.description:
【

Building distributed systems teaches you many lessons, but few are as counterintuitive as this: the clock on your machine is lying to you. The assumption that you can look at two events across two different machines and confidently say which one happened first feels obvious until the day your system starts producing data inconsistencies that one simply cannot explain.

A classic scenario that many distributed systems engineers have encountered: a team debugging a subtle corruption issue in a distributed cache. Two nodes updating the same key, system clock timestamps used to resolve conflicts, and last write wins. Except the "last" write keeps losing. Clock drift of a few hundred milliseconds between servers, with Network Time Protocol (NTP) corrections making things worse, not better. It's a painful but effective reminder of why system clocks cannot be trusted in a distributed system.

】

构建分布式系统可以教会你很多教训，但很少有像这样违反直觉的：你机器上的时钟在骗你。假设您可以查看两台不同机器上的两个事件，并自信地说哪一个事件先发生，这一假设感觉很明显，直到有一天您的系统开始产生无法解释的数据不一致。

许多分布式系统工程师都遇到过的一个经典场景：团队调试分布式缓存中的微妙损坏问题。两个节点更新相同的密钥、用于解决冲突的系统时钟时间戳以及最后写入获胜。除了“最后”写入不断丢失。服务器之间的时钟漂移为几百毫秒，网络时间协议 (NTP) 校正使情况变得更糟，而不是更好。这是一个痛苦但有效的提醒，提醒我们为什么系统时钟在分布式系统中不可信。
